commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch expands `node.pair.remove` to remove node-role records from the device-pairing store, preserve mixed-role device tokens, clear legacy node pairings/runtime state, add a credential-mutation barrier, and cover the gateway path with regression tests.

PR surface: Source +188, Tests +376. Total +564 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main lists device-backed node-role pairings but `node.pair.remove` only deletes legacy node-pairing records, matching the linked `unknown nodeId` failure for Android rows.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow docs repair is needed before this otherwise bounded gateway fix should merge.

target.title: fix(gateway): remove device-backed node pairings
target.author: alix-007
